title: Digital community manager
change: Occupational standard and assessment plan revised
overviewOfRole: Facilitate and instigate direct communication online between the end user or customer and the organisation.

knowledges.detail: The organisation’s values, mission, and business objectives, to support communication and strategic goals.
The organisation’s products and services, their features, and how they meet customer needs.
Communication strategies and their role within organisational objectives.
Industry trends, emerging technologies, and wider topics that impact digital communities.
Competitor analysis, including how benchmarking and insights can inform community strategies.
Social media platforms, online forums, and content management systems, including their features and functions.
Audience demographics, including how factors such as age, interests, and behaviours influence engagement.
Community engagement strategies, including fostering discussions, encouraging participation, and maintaining brand voice.
Communication and copywriting principles for clear, and persuasive messaging.
Digital marketing principles and how they apply to community management, brand positioning, and audience engagement.
Strategies for community growth, relationship building, and audience advocacy.
Conflict resolution techniques and best practices for managing disputes and negative interactions.
Principles of crisis management, including how to handle public relations challenges and reputational risks.
Data analysis methods, including tracking engagement metrics and sentiment analysis to inform decision making.
Cyber security principles, including how to recognise risks, safeguard data, and follow security best practices.
Organisational policies and procedures related to data protection, compliance, and online conduct.
Sustainability considerations, including environmental impact and ethical practices in digital operations.
Internal collaboration processes and how community insights feed into organisational decision making.

behaviours.detail: Demonstrates professionalism, integrity, resilience and ethical decision-making.
Commits to continuous professional development (CPD), seeking opportunities to improve skills and stay updated with industry trends.
Supports an inclusive and respectful community culture, treating colleagues and members fairly and without bias.
Takes an environmentally sustainable approach to working practices.

skills.detail: Apply the organisation’s values, mission, products, and services to ensure aligned and informed communication with the community.
Implement communication strategies that align with organisational objectives and audience needs.
Monitor industry trends and competitor activity to identify opportunities and inform engagement strategies.
Manage and moderate online discussions across social media platforms, forums, and content management systems.
Create content using communication and copywriting techniques to engage audiences.
Adapt communication style and content to suit different audience demographics, platforms, and engagement preferences.
Apply community engagement techniques to foster discussions, encourage participation, and maintain a positive brand presence.
Proactively engage with community members to build relationships, encourage advocacy, and foster brand loyalty.
Manage conflicts using resolution techniques to handle disputes and maintain community standards.
Respond to and manage crisis situations, minimising reputational risk and ensuring brand protection.
Analyse engagement data and sentiment trends to assess effectiveness, identify insights and evaluate outcomes to inform community strategies.
Comply with organisational policies, data protection regulations, equity & diversity and cybersecurity requirements when managing community interactions.
Apply sustainability best practices to minimise environmental impact.
Collaborate with internal teams for example marketing, PR, product development to align community insights with organisational strategies.
Analyse and evaluate the information created by data analytics to review actions.

eQAProvider.contactAddress:
Ofqual
Earlsdon Park, 53-55 Butts Road, Coventry, CV1 3BH

involvedEmployers: Ubisoft, Auroch Digital, Rebellion, Future Games of London, New Dawns, Sports Interactive, Coatsink Software, Blazing Griffin
englishAndMathsQualifications: <p>English and maths qualifications must be completed in line with the <a rel="noopener" href="https://www.gov.uk/guidance/apprenticeship-funding-rules" target="_blank">apprenticeship funding rules</a>.</p>
reviewDetails: this apprenticeship will be reviewed in accordance with our change request policy.
clusterDescription: Facilitate and instigate direct communication online between the end user or customer and the organisation, implementing communication strategies to support business objectives.

duties.dutyDetail: Engage support and enable the community by responding to call to actions and contributing to conversation and debate.
Deliver the communication strategy adapting the tone and voice to suit the particular audience of the different online media channels and stay within the platform holder’s policies and guidelines.
Review and analyse forums and community sites to identify threats and opportunities, create reports and escalate data and or information.
Take an active role in their communities, participating and leading forum discussions and engaging interest through creating or contributing to assets, offering support and answering questions.
Use custom or internal forum software and content management systems to manage and schedule posts. Delivery of assets as per a communication strategy, plan or schedule.
React and respond to a wide range of topics pertinent to an organisation's product, service or brand and the wider industry community.
Review the effectiveness of their actions online in order to report and inform an organisation's or their own future behaviour.
Manage inappropriate comments positively by escalation and enforcing conduct standards.
Implement communication strategies to support business and communication objectives whilst delivering both positive and unwelcome information to the community.
Drive customer loyalty and a positive experience for the community.
Adhere to organisational policies and procedures.
